data.name: I got STRADDLED by a FEMBOY
data.detailed_description:
*All characters in this game are over the age of 21 years old.

Male on Femboy

Another weekend visiting your parents.

Unfortunately, your uncle is also visiting, and he's dragging you all along to the racetrack. He's a betting man and will be swinging by the bar after all the action is over, so don't count on going home anytime soon. Also, as luck would have it, you forgot your Switch, so you'll have to find some other way to entertain yourself--perhaps you can find a friend? Giddy up, cowboy!

Read through an exciting story as well as some pretty raunchy(erotic) dialogue, accompanied by spicy nude depictions.

Gameplay
  • Kinetic Visual Novel
  • H-Scenes
  • ~2.5K words

Immerse yourself in the story by typing in your own name, then proceeding to read through a raunchy story from the first-person perspective.

data.short_description: You find yourself at the horse racetrack without any entertainment. Try to find something to do...

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz Pentium 4
  • 記憶體: 400 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
